name: ai.bringyour/bringyour
title: Bring Your AI
description: No-data MCP handoff for local Claude Code to Codex harness moves.

tools.name: preview_move
tools.description: Preview supported source and destination harness moves without receiving user files.

tools.name: preview_build_setup
tools.description: Preview first-setup generation options without receiving user files or work history.

tools.name: install_local_cli
tools.description: Return local CLI installation commands and verification steps.

tools.name: list_targets
tools.description: List supported source and destination agent harnesses.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List buyable local CLI products and checkout routes without receiving harness files.

tools.name: quote_lifetime_license
tools.description: Return a deterministic quote for the lifetime license without receiving harness files.

tools.name: start_checkout
tools.description: Start the Stripe-hosted checkout handoff for a selected license tier.
